events.title: Saratoga Farmers Market
events.location: West Valley College parking lot, 14000 Fruitvale Ave, Saratoga, CA 95070
events.description: Weekly farmers market featuring fresh local produce, live music, and coffee. Free to attend, dogs welcome.

events.emailSubject: Join us at the ArtNow Awards Ceremony!
events.title: ArtNow 2026 Awards Ceremony
events.location: New Museum Los Gatos (NUMU), 106 E. Main Street, Los Gatos, CA
events.description: Celebrate 97 high school artists and announce award recipients of ArtNow 2026. Explore the exhibition, enjoy performances and art activities, and participate in People's Choice Award voting. Over $10,000 in cash prizes and scholarships will be awarded.
